hypothesis: If NEB pathways for CsPbI3 phase transitions and the TiO2-B→anatase transformation are first optimized with pretrained equivariant ML surrogates (eqV2/eSEN) and then refined by DFT, then the DFT SSNEB will reproduce VASP-only transition states and barrier heights while requiring fewer iterations and less compute time because the ML models provide near-DFT-accurate energies, forces, and stresses that initialize the path close to the true MEP.
